full_text:
Zhang Ming
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Ming. Officer of Wang Jing, sent out to attack Jiang Wei’s army. Wei army is soundly beaten. Zhang Ming may not have existed in history. Zhang Ming was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
